hooks.command: $input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = if ($input.tool_input.file_path) { $input.tool_input.file_path } else { $input.tool_response.filePath }; $repo = 'C:\Users\10557\Desktop\aaa'; if ($f) { git -C $repo add $f; git -C $repo commit -m "auto: update $($f | Split-Path -Leaf)" --no-verify 2>$null; Start-Process -FilePath 'git' -ArgumentList '-C', $repo, 'push' -WindowStyle Hidden }; exit 0

Start-Process -FilePath 'node' -ArgumentList 'src/index.js' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\Users\10557\Desktop\aaa\server' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath 'cmd' -ArgumentList '/c','npm run dev' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\Users\10557\Desktop\aaa\client' -WindowStyle Normal
